response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:10: Introductory and mini-game segment. 2. 02:10-04:59: Performance of 'Gacha×Gacha ADVENTURE!'. 3. Searched for 'Raora Panthera original song Gacha×Gacha ADVENTURE! lyrics'. 4. Found official lyrics on Uta-Net and official YouTube description. 5. Included full lyrics in the JSON response.
response.global_summary: This video is a 3D debut showcase for the VTuber Raora Panthera, featuring mini-games, interactions with guests, and the performance of her first original song, "Gacha×Gacha ADVENTURE!". The final scene features the music video and performance of this song.

scenes.description: The video opens with an introductory segment where Raora Panthera is introduced in 3D. She interacts with guests (Mori Calliope, Ouro Kronii, etc.) and plays mini-games. No vocal music is playing.
Raora Panthera performs her original song 'Gacha×Gacha ADVENTURE!' on a 3D stage. The song title and credits appear on screen. The song features high-energy vocals and dance choreography.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Gacha×Gacha ADVENTURE!
(Yes! Yes! Yes! Pon! Pon!)
(Yes! Yes! Yes! Pon! Pon!)
(Gacha, Gacha, RAOOOOO!!)

Come on, come on, let's go on a treasure hunt!
"What kind of prey will we find today, nya?"
Come on, come on, everyone, let's go together!
"Let's set off on a fun adventure!"
(Un! Due! Tre!)

Once you're hooked, you can't get out~
Food, plushies, Pizza, and Pasta, everything is packed into this fascinating labyrinth
The excitement never stops (Proviamo!)
It looks like I can grab it, but I can't, it's frustrating, the crane game
"Nyaa, geez!"
It's not like I'm going to just give up and retire!
"Aim for a complete set!"

Come on, even if you stop me, it's useless♪
Repeating the deja vu over and over again
Don't tell me to give up (;ω;)
Third time's the charm, so no problem
My overflowing feelings won't stop
Is this my calling!?
It's filled with fun things, and it will be forever
"Yes, ready, go!"

Gacha×Gacha ADVENTURE!
(Gacha... Gacha... Gacha... Gacha...)
"Game, restart!"
Let's spin it round and round!
"No... it won't stop!"
Until I get the prey I'm looking for
"Please... one more time!"
(Bim bum bam!)
Once I'm on the beat, I can't stop~
I'm good at rhythm games too
Combo, Fever, everything, if I nail it all, it's the perfect Groove!
If you miss, it's game over (Andiamo!)
Racing game, engine at full throttle, it's a hot, heated battle!
"Go, go, go!"
If you take the lead in the corner, aim for 1st place!
Come on, even if it's one more time, today is the end
I started to say "one more time" and stopped
The fun feeling makes my chest tighten
Hey, hey, do I really have to say goodbye now?
I don't want to go home yet
Is this love!?
The future filled with excitement, let's have an adventure together!

Come on, even if you stop me, it's useless♪
Repeating the deja vu over and over again
Don't tell me to give up (;ω;)
No matter how many times, I'll challenge it, so no problem
My overflowing feelings won't stop
This is my calling!!
I can start over as many times as I want, that's what life is
(Everyone together!)

Gacha×Gacha ADVENTURE!
(Yes! Yes! Yes! Pon! Pon!)
(Yes! Yes! Yes! Pon! Pon!)
(Gacha, Gacha, RAOOOOO!!)
"Let's go on an adventure together again! Ciao ciao♪",reference_lyrics_og:
